name: The Black Banner at the Gate
description: A raiding host masses beyond the walls under a black banner. The garrison looks to you — how the hold answers this will be told for years.

choices.label: Hold the wall and weather it
choices.description: Stand the line and trust the stone.

choices.label: [Warlord] Lead a sally from the gate
choices.description: Ride out at their head and break the host before it sets.

choices.label: [Sorcerer] Call down ruin upon them
choices.description: Raw power, loosed without restraint — and a little of yourself with it.

choices.label: [Mystic] Loose them into the dark
choices.description: Slip out by night and turn their own fear against them.

name: The Disputed Marches
description: A neighboring power presses claims on the borderlands. Envoys wait in the hall for your answer.

choices.label: [Steward] Broker a trade that favors us
choices.description: Turn the dispute into a contract — and a profit.

choices.label: [Warlord] A show of force on the line
choices.description: March the garrison to the border and let the steel speak.

name: The Whispering Relic
description: Diggers turn up a sealed casket that hums with old power. It should not be opened lightly — but it should not be ignored either.

choices.label: Lock it deep and forget it
choices.description: Some doors are best left shut.

choices.label: [Wizard] Study and cleanse it
choices.description: Patient warding draws the venom and leaves the gift.

choices.label: [Warlock] Bend its power to your will
choices.description: Potent, and perilous — the dark always asks a price.
